TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage-Engine Latest version (11.5.2600.32.W) updated:- BUS-CENTER-PC, MELSDESKTOP, MEGAN
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.5.2600.32.W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine(BUS-CENTER-PC, MELSDESKTOP, MEGAN)and Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Failed patches updated on machine Megan,DESKTOP-N6E84SS,DESKTOP-I7G1MM7,Melsdesktop
TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on the ticket. Login to the manage engine portal and checked failed or missing patches for the below mentioned machine then download and installed

the failed patches manually which are applicable to the computer. Then scan the machine for installed patches.

Didn't reboot the machine as multiple user task were open. So will reboot the machine in APD

 

Machine : Megan,DESKTOP-N6E84SS,DESKTOP-I7G1MM7,Melsdesktop

Patch installed:

Patch ID Patch Name

357629 Zoom Workplace (EXE) (x64) (User Based) (7.0.1.34140)

113145 2026-03 Cumulative Update for Windows 11, version 25H2 for x64-based Systems (KB5086672) (26200.8117)

357725 Adobe Acrobat Reader DC (x64) (26.001.21367)

TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for AAVA:- Sophos Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the AAVA:- Sophos Firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Logged into the portal to check high-vulnerability systems and agent version status for AAVA Systems
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal to check high-vulnerability systems and agent version status for AAVA Systems

TimeEntry.Title: Failed patches updated on machine Bus-Center-PC,DESKTOP-I7G1MM7,DESKTOP-N6E84SS,Megan
TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on the ticket. Login to the manage engine portal and checked failed or missing patches for the below mentioned machine then download and installed

the failed patches manually which are applicable to the computer. Then login again in manage engine portal and scan the machines for installed patches in APD. After scan the machines are now in healthy systems.

 

Machine : Bus-Center-PC,DESKTOP-I7G1MM7,DESKTOP-N6E84SS,Megan

Patch installed:

Patch ID Patch Name

43980 Update for Microsoft 365 Apps for Enterprise Current Channel for x64 2603 of version(19822.20168)

357851 Google Chrome (x64) (147.0.7727.55,147.0.7727.56)

113160 Update for Microsoft WebView2 Runtime (x64) (146.0.3856.109)

TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for AAVA:- Sophos Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the AAVA:- Sophos Firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket...

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162, replaced with Version 0.14.150 on Patty-Lenovo, DESKTOP-N6E84SS
TimeEntry.Notes: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162, replaced with Version 0.14.150 on Patty-Lenovo, DESKTOP-N6E84SS.

TimeEntry.Title: My Remote version 26.1.25.9592 updated on machine BUS-CENTER-PC,DESKTOP-I7G1MM7,DESKTOP-N6E84SS,MELSDESKTOP
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine BUS-CENTER-PC,DESKTOP-I7G1MM7,DESKTOP-N6E84SS,MELSDESKTOP
running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine. Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 26.1.25.9592. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Megan- printer
TimeEntry.Notes: Megan issues with printer. checked the machine and printer drives. Found out machine was connected on different network and rebooted the printer.

TimeEntry.Title: Device Megan & DESKTOP-N6E84SS was identified as non-compliant due to missing patches.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Device Megan & DESKTOP-N6E84SS was identified as non-compliant due to missing patches.

Logged in to the ManageEngine portal and verified pending updates on the affected system. Proceeded with patch remediation by installing the following updates:

  • Microsoft 365 Apps for Enterprise Current Channel (Version 2603, Build 19822.20182)
  • Microsoft WebView2 Runtime (x64) – Version 147.0.3912.72
  • Google Chrome (x64) – Versions 147.0.7727.101 / 147.0.7727.102

After installation, performed a manual patch scan on the system to verify successful deployment and to clear the pending patch status.

Post validation, confirmed that all patches have been successfully applied and no high vulnerabilities remain. The system is now compliant as per patch management policy.

TimeEntry.Title: Firewall weekly backup is successfully done for 19-04-2026
TimeEntry.Notes: Firewall weekly configuration backup is successfully done for 19-04-2026

the failed patches manually which are applicable to the computer. Then scan the machine for installed patches. After scan  the machines are now in healthy systems.
